creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 238661
unbreak consumers: mepo, zls

As a workaround vendor build can be installed system-wide. It can be even provided as lang/zig-bin a la AUR or Gentoo.
https://ziglang.org/download/0.10.0/zig-freebsd-x86_64-0.10.0.tar.xz

https://github.com/ziglang/zig/issues/13565 may imply marking with BROKEN_FreeBSD_12

From reverse dependencies (aka consumers) perspective:
- astro/mepo is ready but needs update to 1.1.1 (patch attached)
- devel/zls is ready but needs update to 0.10.0 (patch attached)
- x11-wm/river is not ready yet: 0.2.0 planned for wlroots 0.16, 0.2.1 planned for zig 0.10
